market_sentiment.label: 中性
market_sentiment.summary: 資料更新中，請稍後再試

articles.title: Patronus AI lands $50M  to build ‘digital worlds’ that stress-test AI agents
articles.description: Agent testing startup Patronus AI,  founded by former Meta AI researchers, is experienced nearly insatiable demand, its investor says.

articles.title: Bitcoin options traders hedge downside as uncertainty lingers, Anchorage says
articles.description: Anchorage Digital’s latest analysis shows Bitcoin options traders remain defensive as near-term uncertainty persists, though markets are not pricing an extreme downside scenario for Strategy.

articles.title: Polymarket says hackers stole users’ funds
articles.description: The prediction market giant Polymarket said it's refunding users who had funds stolen due to a third party breach.

articles.title: Bitcoin may fall lower but BTC power-law frames crash to $58K as ‘normal’
articles.description: Bitcoin’s drop to $58,000 lines up with the power-law model’s cycle lows, even though futures market data points to deeper lows for BTC price.

articles.title: Xbox follows Apple with price increases
articles.description: The company says the increases are being driven by rising memory and console storage prices, with costs more than 2.5x higher than previous levels.

articles.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
articles.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

articles.title: Half of UK wealth advisers say clients' crypto is ‘invisible’ to them: CoinShares survey
articles.description: A CoinShares survey found than many EU-based wealth management companies had policies that restricted investments in digital assets or provided no guidance on the matter.

articles.title: Notion Mail shuts down amid agent takeover
articles.description: The company said it is discontinuing its email inbox in favor of its AI agent offering as users are increasingly handing over the reins of their email to the agents.

articles.title: Coinbase's Base blockchain resumes after two-hour outage disrupted network
articles.description: The incident temporarily halted transaction processing on one of Ethereum's largest layer-2 networks.

articles.title: Bitcoin drop to $58K brings out bears: Is BTC’s next stop below $50K?
articles.description: Bitcoin’s crash to $58,000 confirmed a bear flag breakdown, setting a new price target of $54,000 or lower.

articles.title: Strategy's yield-generating STRC stock is more correlated with BTC than ever
articles.description: The tightening correlation undermines STRC's appeal as a relatively steadier income vehicle.

articles.title: Anthropic’s Claude is winning over paid consumers, a market owned by ChatGPT
articles.description: Despite ChatGPT's commanding market lead, consumers who pay for AI have been increasingly choosing Anthropic's Claude, data shows.

articles.title: Kraken in talks to buy 15% stake in DeFi lender Aave at $385 million valuation
articles.description: The DeFi lender is rebuilding after the fallout from April's KelpDAO exploit sparked a multibillion-dollar exodus of deposits despite Aave itself not being hacked.

articles.title: XRP risks drop below $1, but onchain data highlights silver lining
articles.description: XRP’s chance of a daily close below $1 are rising, but whale accumulation and shrinking exchange supply may be a sign that traders are buying.

articles.title: a16z-backed crypto firm rebrands, shifts focus to solving AI’s global copyright headache
articles.description: The startup formerly known as Story Protocol raised $140 million to secure internet rights and is now building an audit layer for data consent, licensing, and provenance for tech firms.

articles.title: 21shares trims 2026 crypto forecasts despite institutional adoption gains
articles.description: Asset manager 21shares sees crypto infrastructure advancing faster than prices, as ETFs, stablecoins and prediction markets mature while several 2026 targets slip.

articles.title: General Intuition’s $2.3B bet that video games can train AI agents for the real world
articles.description: General Intuition has raised $320 million to scale AI trained on millions of hours of gameplay, betting action data can help AI develop something closer to human intuition.

articles.title: Databricks’ former AI chief thinks he can cut AI’s power bill by 1,000x
articles.description: Un-0 is an image-generation system tool that shows for the first time how the company's technology can replicate conventional AI systems.

articles.title: Kraken, Maple launch onchain warehouse facility for crypto-backed institutional loans
articles.description: Kraken's new facility with Maple brings a traditional warehouse financing model onchain, allowing the exchange to expand its institutional crypto lending business using blockchain-based structured credit.

articles.title: South Korean authorities fine Bithumb $136K over sharing user information overseas
articles.description: The fine comes after an investigation concluded that Bithumb shared information with many overseas exchanges in violation of laws intended to protect user data.
